sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check pixel counts of initial pink strip
init_seg = history[0].frame.segmentation
init_pink_pixels = [(init_seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash'], init_seg['nodes'][49+i]['pixels']) for i in range(5)]
print(f"Initial pink (hash, pixels): {init_pink_pixels}")

# Check sky blue strip pixel counts in initial frame
init_sky_pixels = [(init_seg['nodes'][44+i]['hash'], init_seg['nodes'][44+i]['pixels']) for i in range(5)]
print(f"Initial sky blue (hash, pixels): {init_sky_pixels}")

# Check if any initial pink hashes match sky blue hashes (same shape, different color?)
init_pink_hashes = [init_seg['nodes'][49+i]['hash'] for i in range(5)]
init_sky_hashes = [init_seg['nodes'][44+i]['hash'] for i in range(5)]
print(f"\nInitial pink hashes: {init_pink_hashes}")
print(f"Initial sky blue hashes: {init_sky_hashes}")

# Check top grid pixel counts
init_top_pixels = [(init_seg['nodes'][12+i]['color'], init_seg['nodes'][12+i]['hash'], init_seg['nodes'][12+i]['pixels']) for i in range(12)]
print(f"\nTop grid (color, hash, pixels):")
for c, h, p in init_top_pixels:
    print(f"  {c}: {h} ({p} px)")

# Now let me explore the current pink position 0 cycle to find all available symbols and their pixel counts
seg = current_frame.segmentation
# Current cursor at pos 3 (marker 36-40)
# Navigate to pos 0
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Explore pos 0 cycle
cycle0 = []
start_hash = seg['nodes'][49]['hash']
start_pixels = seg['nodes'][49]['pixels']
cycle0.append((start_hash, start_pixels))

for _ in range(8):
    action(['UP'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    h = seg['nodes'][49]['hash']
    p = seg['nodes'][49]['pixels']
    cycle0.append((h, p))
    if h == start_hash and len(cycle0) > 2:
        break

print(f"\nPos 0 cycle (hash, pixels): {cycle0}")

# Check which pixel counts are in pos 0 cycle
pos0_pixels = set(p for _, p in cycle0)
print(f"Pos 0 available pixel counts: {pos0_pixels}")

# Check sky blue pixel counts
sky_pixels = [init_sky_pixels[i][1] for i in range(5)]
print(f"Sky blue pixel counts: {sky_pixels}")
print(f"Sky blue pixel counts in pos 0: {[p in pos0_pixels for p in sky_pixels]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
